scenario.name: Text_call_recording_session

Global.variables: LOG_SRS_username, SIP_call_id, Call_ID, Incident_ID, Text_host1, Text_host2

scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[$LOG_SRS_username]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:ng911_test_system@[local_ip]:[local_port]> To: sip:[$LOG_SRS_username]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [$SIP_call_id] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:ng911_test_system@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Require: siprec Accept: application/sdp, application/rs-metadata Content-Type: multipart/mixed;boundary=next-content Call-Info: [$Call_ID];purpose=emergency-CallId Call-Info: [$Incident_ID];purpose=emergency-IncidentId Resource-Priority: esnet.1 Content-Length: [len]
--next-content Content-Type: application/sdp Content-ID: <participant1_sdp@[local_ip]>
v=0 o=SRS 2890844526 2890844526 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=text 12240 RTP/AVP 98 a=rtpmap:98 t140/1000 a=sendonly a=label:1
--next-content Content-Type: application/sdp Content-ID: <participant2_sdp@[local_ip]>
v=0 o=SRS 2890844526 2890844526 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=text 12242 RTP/AVP 98 a=rtpmap:98 t140/1000 a=sendonly a=label:2
--next-content--

ACK sip:[$LOG_SRS_username]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:ng911_test_system@[local_ip]:[local_port]> To: sip:[$LOG_SRS_username]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [$SIP_call_id] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:ng911_test_system@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[$LOG_SRS_username]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:ng911_test_system@[local_ip]:[local_port]> To: sip:[$LOG_SRS_username]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [$SIP_call_id] Cseq: 1 BYE Contact: sip:ng911_test_system@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
